title: Argentina's Delight Reborn
description: This mod adds many kinds of barbeques with an Argentinian twist
body: **IMPORTANT: This mod requires [Geckolib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib) and [playerAnimator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator).** ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66778cdf7baf51efcd4a113c629ccc2ab846e178.gif) Argentina's Delight Reborn is a remake of Argentina's Delight. In this mod you'll be able to make different kinds of barbeques, known as "asados" in Argentina. There's a whole butchering system that allows players to select which meat cuts they are going to grill. You can also grill vanilla and modded items, and doing so will give them special properties. This whole process can be automated. This mod is compatible with [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) Argentina's Delight Reborn offers an interactive way of cooking your meals and new food blocks to decorate your world. ¡VIVA LA PATRIA! [![Invitame un café en cafecito.app](https://cdn.cafecito.app/imgs/buttons/button_6.svg)](https://cafecito.app/guillefreak)
